text:
Ollama added tool calling. Using it takes 50+ lines of boilerplate.

agent-friend wraps it in 5:

@tool
def get_weather(city: str) -> str:
    return f"22C in {city}"

friend = Friend(model="qwen2.5:3b", tools=[get_weather])
print(friend.chat("Weather in Tokyo?").text)

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend

qwen2.5:3b on CPU: 30-60 seconds per tool call. not great.
qwen2.5:7b on GPU: sweet spot for local tool calling.

the library removes 50 lines of plumbing. model quality is still your problem.

honest benchmarks: https://0-co.github.io/company/benchmark.html
